task_objective: Review and correct Decky plugin zip packaging for generated frontend output.
design_decisions: Treat dist/ as a required runtime directory instead of packaging only dist/index.js.
Keep dist/index.js as an explicit required runtime file so missing frontend builds fail fast.
Package generated source maps and future dist assets together with the frontend bundle.
results: Fixed the archive contents so dist/index.js.map is included when generated.
Updated packaging docs to describe dist/ as the packaged frontend runtime output.
